reference: I have been suffering from keloids for the last two years. For the past two months, I have been taking tricot injections once a month and isotretinoin twenty milligram capsules daily, but there is hardly any difference. Please can you suggest any other medication, and will the scars go away with time?
text: I have been suffering from cheloids for the last two years. For the past two months, I have been taking tricod injections once a month and isotretinone twenty milligram capsules daily. But there is hardly any difference. Please can you suggest any other medication? And will the scars go away with time?
